name: BB:UBA : Data Loss Devices
notes: Building block to detect data loss based on QRadar supported devices.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Data Loss Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Symantec DLP
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Data Loss Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Symantec DLP
